name: Longest Palindromic Substring
description: Given a string s, return the longest palindromic substring in s. Use expand-around-center approach for O(n^2) time and O(1) space.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000. s consist of only digits and English letters.

performance.stress_intent: exercise longest-palindrome validation on max-size 1000-character strings that reject cubic substring enumeration locally
